about.hero.title: We build better German learning
about.hero.subtitle: Practical skills. Clear progress.
about.hero.description: Short, focused lessons and real-world practice that help learners move from study to confidence.
about.sections.realLife.title: Learning built for real life
about.sections.realLife.p1: Lessons focus on situations you actually encounter - at work, in conversations, and in everyday routines.
about.sections.realLife.p2: We emphasize usefulness over abstract theory with clear examples you can apply right away.
about.sections.realLife.p3: Think of language as a tool for getting things done, not an academic subject to memorize.
about.sections.consistency.title: Consistency over intensity
about.sections.consistency.p1: You do not need long study sessions. Small, regular practice leads to lasting results.
about.sections.consistency.p2: Daily, manageable habits avoid burnout and make progress predictable.
about.sections.consistency.p3: Repeated exposure over time builds durable skills more reliably than occasional intensive effort.
about.sections.consistency.p4: Long-term progress comes from routines that fit your life.
about.sections.consistency.quote: Language learning is not about doing more - it is about showing up consistently.
about.sections.consistency.p5: When small, regular practice becomes habit, confidence grows naturally.
about.sections.fits.title: Learning that fits your life
about.sections.fits.p1: Simple Deutsch is designed around real schedules and real goals.
about.sections.fits.p2: The focus stays on clarity, confidence, and steady improvement.
about.testimonials.heading: Why learners trust Simple Deutsch
about.testimonials.sub: Real learners share what works: clarity, practice, and steady progress.
about.testimonials.1.name: Anna Muller
about.testimonials.1.text: Clear tasks helped me practice useful phrases for work and daily life.
about.testimonials.2.name: Oleg Petrov
about.testimonials.2.text: Short, predictable lessons helped me build a routine.
about.testimonials.3.name: Lena Fischer
about.testimonials.3.text: Practical dialogue work made speaking feel natural.
about.testimonials.4.name: Mateo Rossi
about.testimonials.4.text: Small steps prevent overload and keep momentum.
about.testimonials.5.name: Sofia Ivanova
about.testimonials.5.text: Daily practice felt achievable and built confidence.
about.testimonials.6.name: Jonas Becker
about.testimonials.6.text: Real-world examples made learning useful from day one.
about.cta.finalLead: Clear lessons, practical exercises, and steady progress to build real confidence in German.
